title: Comedy Classics
desc: Creators explore the origins and impact of beloved British sitcoms in documentary series.

title: Navvuthu Bathakalira
desc: An enthusiastic and kind young man makes his living by earning commission from a travel company. His dignity at the work place falls apart when he is accused of ruining a family.

title: Koruko Comedy Live Callers
desc: A funny collection of moments from Telugu films, featuring famous actors and comedians, offering lighthearted, entertaining scenes that bring laughter to viewers around the world.

title: Bomma Block Buster
desc: Pothuraju's dream is to have his idol, director Puri Jagannath, make a film about him. When Pothuraju discovers life-altering secrets about his life, he must confront the pain behind his antics.

title: Jump Jilani
desc: Satti Babu and Ram Babu, who runs a hotel, encounter hooligans who threaten to shut down their hotel. Satti decides to take help of a health officer.

desc: Two hosts tour various restaurants, sampling delicious dishes, and challenge participants to participate in entertaining food-based games, creating playful moments and tasty, shared experiences.

title: Comedy Collection
desc: A friendly host shares funny movie clips from many decades, showing how humor in films has changed and evolved over time for viewers at home.

title: Cinema Chupistha Mama
desc: Kaththi, a laid-back guy with no direction, unexpectedly falls for Bengali beauty Parineetha. To win her heart, he must meet her father's quirky conditions for marriage.

desc: Three young men leave their village to find decent jobs in the city. However, they find themselves in a pickle when a minister blackmails them for a lost mobile phone.
